declarations.description: Buttons represent actions that are available to the user.
declarations.name: SlButton

members.name: variant
members.description: The button's theme variant.

members.name: size
members.description: The button's size.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables the button.

members.name: loading
members.description: Draws the button in a loading state.

members.name: outline
members.description: Draws an outlined button.

members.name: pill
members.description: Draws a pill-style button with rounded edges.

members.name: href
members.description: When set, the underlying button will be rendered as an <a> with this href.

members.name: click
members.description: Simulates a click on the button.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: A presentational prefix icon or similar element.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: A presentational suffix icon or similar element.

events.name: sl-blur
events.description: Emitted when the button loses focus.

events.name: sl-focus
events.description: Emitted when the button gains focus.

declarations.description: Icons are symbols that can be used to represent various options within an application.
declarations.name: SlIcon

members.name: name
members.description: The name of the icon to draw. Available names depend on the icon library being used.

members.name: src
members.description: An external URL of an SVG file. Be sure you trust the content you are including.

members.name: label
members.description: An accessible, short-text label. Provides an alternative to using role="img" with an aria-label.

members.name: library
members.description: The name of a registered custom icon library.

events.name: sl-load
events.description: Emitted when the icon has loaded.

events.name: sl-error
events.description: Emitted when the icon fails to load due to an error.

declarations.description: Inputs collect data from the user.
declarations.name: SlInput

members.name: type
members.description: The type of input.

members.name: size
members.description: The input's size.

members.name: label
members.description: The input's label.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder text to show as a hint when the input is empty.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables the input.

members.name: required
members.description: Makes the input a required field.

members.name: value
members.description: The current value of the input.

slots.name: prefix
slots.description: Used to prepend a presentational icon or similar element to the input.

slots.name: suffix
slots.description: Used to append a presentational icon or similar element to the input.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Text that describes how to use the input.

events.name: sl-change
events.description: Emitted when an alteration to the control's value is committed.

events.name: sl-input
events.description: Emitted when the control receives input.

declarations.description: Dialogs, sometimes called 'modals', appear above the page and require the user's immediate attention.
declarations.name: SlDialog

members.name: open
members.description: Indicates whether or not the dialog is open.

members.name: label
members.description: The dialog's label as displayed in the header.

members.name: noHeader
members.description: Disables the header.

members.name: show
members.description: Shows the dialog.

members.name: hide
members.description: Hides the dialog.

slots.name: header-actions
slots.description: Optional actions to add to the header.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: The dialog's footer, usually one or more buttons representing various options.

events.name: sl-after-show
events.description: Emitted after the dialog opens and all animations are complete.

events.name: sl-after-hide
events.description: Emitted after the dialog closes and all animations are complete.

declarations.description: Badges are used to draw attention and display statuses or counts.
declarations.name: SlBadge

members.name: variant
members.description: The badge's theme variant.

members.name: pill
members.description: Draws a pill-style badge with rounded edges.

members.name: pulse
members.description: Makes the badge pulsate to draw attention.
